nodes.label: GIVEN valid account data WHEN created THEN it persists with UUID pk.
GIVEN a host WHEN an account binds to it THEN host_binding is set.
GIVEN an account WHEN str() is called THEN format is provider:label.
GIVEN an account WHEN rotated THEN rotated_at is set and revoked_at is null.
GIVEN a thread WHEN an approval is requested THEN it is pending.
GIVEN an approval WHEN it expires THEN status is expired.
GIVEN an action WHEN audited THEN redacted payload is stored.
GIVEN a system event WHEN no thread is involved THEN thread is null.
GIVEN a new PolicyProfile WHEN created with defaults THEN cloud models and RC ar
GIVEN a confidential profile THEN it denies unknown jurisdictions.
GIVEN a policy WHEN str() is called THEN name is returned.
GIVEN valid thread data WHEN created THEN it persists with pending status.
GIVEN a project and host WHEN a thread links both THEN FKs resolve.
GIVEN a thread WHEN a message is created THEN redaction fields exist.
GIVEN a Message WHEN redacted_content is None THEN IntegrityError is raised.
GIVEN the SDK runtime mode WHEN a Thread is created THEN it persists.
